name: Cwmyoy Leaning Church & Vale of Ewyas
terrain: Lanes, steep field paths, Hatterall Ridge (short section)
highlights: Most famously crooked church in Britain — climb the ridge above.
points_of_interest: St Martin's Church Cwmyoy (leans spectacularly due to landslip); ancient yew
viewpoints: Vale of Ewyas; Skirrid to the south
food_drink_nearby: Skirrid Inn Llanvihangel Crucorney (oldest pub in Wales); The Hardwick Abergavenny
hazards_notes: Very narrow single-track lanes to Cwmyoy; parking tight
